title: Khaymanta Fajardo
html:
Khaymanta Fajardo

Stub. Renaissance scholar / mentor to high-school-senior Yahir during the 2021 Renaissance Scholarship application cycle. Helped on Yahir's first February submission. Named in the bullet-brainstorm and body of 2021 04 13 diana hoff renaissance email ("with the help of my mentors, including current Renaissance scholar Khaymanta Fajardo"). Second-mention reference in 2021 07 06 contact diana hoff summer todos.
